description_long: This is a rectangular, heavy-duty toolbox with a robust, industrial appearance. The main body is constructed from a reddish-brown metal with visible weathering, scratches, and some rust stains, suggesting frequent use in outdoor or garage environments. The lid is a solid black color, likely made of metal or a durable composite, and features a metallic band around its edge, possibly for reinforcement or as a decorative accent. The metallic band on the front and back appears to have some subtle patterning or wear, and the overall construction looks sturdy and secure. There are no visible handles or latches on the exterior, giving the box a minimalist, utilitarian look. The box is large enough to store a variety of tools and equipment, making it suitable for use in workshops, garages, or construction sites.
description: A large, rectangular, weathered metal toolbox with a black lid and reddish-brown body, featuring a metallic band around the lid. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black lid with a metallic band and a hint of patterned wear, with the reddish-brown body mostly obscured.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the reddish-brown metal body, visible weathering, and the black lid with a metallic band.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the black lid and metallic band, but no visible handles or latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the reddish-brown body, weathering, and the black lid.
attribute_handle_type: none visible; no external handles for carrying or moving are present.
attribute_latch_mechanism: none visible; no external latches or locking mechanisms are apparent.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The toolbox appears to be a single large compartment with a hinged lid; no internal trays, drawers, or dividers are visible or implied.
